guardrail: static projection of the public register; no facts added here

infrastructure_overlap.note: TW on no shared wholesale-settlement experiment; KR on Project Agora. At least one end off the shared experiments.

inbound_mechanism.detail: A destination with no authorizable issuance pathway dominates the origin’s issuance gap: there is nothing to receive into, whatever the origin holds.

class_basis.instrument: No operative inbound issuance-authorization regime to receive into (draft DABA).
